extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Maestro in the Instance management view. The top panel displays a BPMN-style process diagram for the invoice matching workflow, including robot, agent, human review, email rejection, and financial system update steps. The bottom panel lists running process instances with filters applied for version 1.0.0, last month, status Running, and no error message, showing two active instances and their durations.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the completed invoice-matching process published and running in Maestro, with the process map visible above and the list of running process instances below.
